dag.dag_name: Store Sales delay cascades into Finance daily close

Waits on upstream domain B DAG completion
Waits on upstream domain C DAG completion
Requires all 3 upstream domains to have completed
Consolidates Warehouse data across upstream domains

operator_config.sql: SELECT 1 AS autorca_probe, 'RTL_WHS_CASC' AS dag_id, 'consolidate_whs' AS task_name;

tasks.dependencies: Compares actual start time to expected upstream-completion time
Branch: no material cascade delay detected
Branch: cascade delay detected, triggers cross-DAG AutoRCA

operator_config.sql: SELECT 1 AS autorca_probe, 'RTL_WHS_CASC' AS dag_id, 'load_target' AS task_name;

incident.incident_name: Store Sales delay cascades into Finance daily close
incident.description: Cascading Delay incident on the Warehouse pipeline (RTL_WHS_CASC): store Sales delay cascades into Finance daily close.
incident.symptoms: Finance daily close DAG, gated by an ExternalTaskSensor on Store Sales rollup, starts 3h45m late and finishes past its own SLA.
incident.root_cause: The upstream Store Sales rollup DAG (see LRJ Failure catalogue) ran long due to a Kafka duplicate-event issue, and the downstream Finance DAG's sensor has no independent SLA of its own, only inheriting the delay.
incident.business_impact: Daily sales journal entries post late for two consecutive business days, delaying the finance team's variance analysis.
incident.resolution: Trigger Finance close via a dataset-based trigger (data-aware scheduling) with a documented fallback partial-run path instead of a blocking sensor with no independent ceiling.

expected_rca.expected_rca_summary: AI AutoRCA should identify: The upstream Store Sales rollup DAG (see LRJ Failure catalogue) ran long due to a Kafka duplicate-event issue, and the downstream Finance DAG's sensor has no independent SLA of its own, only inheriting the delay.
expected_rca.evidence_required: Airflow task logs, Datadog infrastructure/application metrics, cross-DAG lineage/dependency graph, JIRA/Confluence RAG context for known-issue matching
expected_rca.airflow_logs: Airflow ExternalTaskSensor log shows extended poke duration matching upstream DAG's late completion timestamp
expected_rca.datadog_metrics: Datadog dag_dependency.upstream_delay custom metric shows correlated spike across both DAGs
expected_rca.resolution: Trigger Finance close via a dataset-based trigger (data-aware scheduling) with a documented fallback partial-run path instead of a blocking sensor with no independent ceiling.
expected_rca.preventive_action: Model cross-DAG dependencies explicitly in the metadata model with a 'max_acceptable_upstream_delay' field so AutoRCA can flag cascade risk before the SLA is actually missed.
